description: Remove payment gating from the application layer. All features previously behind Pro subscription are now free. Backend Convex schema and Polar webhooks remain intact for potential future use.

userStories.title: Bypass isPro check in application
userStories.description: As a user, I can access all features without a Pro subscription because the isPro check always returns true.
acceptanceCriteria: checkUserIsPro() in apps/application/src/core/convex.ts always returns true
userStories.notes: Function now returns true immediately, parameter renamed to _mentraUserId to indicate unused

userStories.title: Remove isPro gate from daily summaries
userStories.description: As a user, I can view my daily summaries without a Pro subscription.
acceptanceCriteria: Always returns isPro: true with summaries data

userStories.title: Remove subscription gate from session summaries
userStories.description: As a user, my session summaries are stored regardless of subscription status.
acceptanceCriteria: Always stores session summaries for all users

userStories.title: Comment out Billing section in Settings
userStories.description: As a user, I no longer see the Billing section in Settings since payments are disabled.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/web/src/components/SettingsPage.tsx Billing button (lines 140-154) is commented out
Billing card section (lines 291-310) is commented out
SubscriptionCard import can be commented out

userStories.title: Remove Pro upgrade prompt from Memory page
userStories.description: As a user, I see my memory log directly without an upgrade prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: Users go straight to viewing summaries or 'no memories yet' state

userStories.title: Unify features list on Home page
userStories.description: As a user, I see all features in a single unified list without Free/Pro distinction.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/web/src/components/HomePage.tsx FEATURES array: all items have isPro: false
UI collapses Free/Pro sections into single 'Features' list
